title: write_smt2: "-wires" option leads to inequivalent descriptions

features.name: sequential_reg_with_partselect_cast
features.description: Code should include a register assigned from a part-select expression wrapped with $unsigned() inside a clocked always block

features.name: function_returning_part_select
features.description: Code should include a function that returns a single-bit part-select from a signed input vector

features.name: signed_wire_from_function_result
features.description: Code should include a wire assigned from a function call where the function input and output are signed types of different widths
features.snippet:
wire signed [5:0] lsb_w6;
assign lsb_w6 = lsb(w6);

features.name: reduction_xor_on_concatenated_part_selects
features.description: Code should include a reduction XOR operation applied to concatenated part-selects of a wide signal
